title: SACRED ROOTS LACTATION - 211info
text: BLACK PARENT INITIATIVE SACRED ROOTS LACTATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breastfeeding assistance through home visits, group classes, and support groups. 901 NE Glisan Street Suite 250 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Individuals who are breastfeeding and who identify as Black, African, or Multi-Ethnic Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Home visits, classes, and support groups: Varies Email (503) 284-8000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 284-8000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard at Stanton Street (2 blocks north of Knott Street). On TriMet bus line 6. Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs * African American Community Breastfeeding Support Programs * Mixed Heritage Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - SACRED ROOTS DOULA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAWUBONA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TOGETHER WE CAN If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BLACK PARENT INITIATIVE
